name: stery-pos-print-bridge
description: Local print bridge for Stery POS receipts

scripts.test:receipt: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {formatReceiptText}=require('./receiptFormatter'); const {normalizeReceiptPayload}=require('./receiptPayload'); const r=normalizeReceiptPayload(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./examples/sample-receipt.json','utf8'))); console.log(formatReceiptText(r));"
scripts.test:receipt:cash: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {formatReceiptText}=require('./receiptFormatter'); const {normalizeReceiptPayload}=require('./receiptPayload'); const r=normalizeReceiptPayload(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./examples/sample-cash-receipt.json','utf8'))); console.log(formatReceiptText(r));"
scripts.test:receipt:credit: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {formatReceiptText}=require('./receiptFormatter'); const {normalizeReceiptPayload}=require('./receiptPayload'); const r=normalizeReceiptPayload(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./examples/sample-credit-receipt.json','utf8'))); console.log(formatReceiptText(r));"
